subcodes.first_line: This is a glorious Book, sent down from God, the Most High, the Most Great. Verily it proceedeth from the Sovereign, and verily it beginneth with the name of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب کریم تنزیل من لدی الله العلی العظیم و انه من سلطان و انه بسم الله
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
